author: y4rr
content: Plan: Phase 6 dispatch begins. Sequence: M1 ConvNeXt depthwise → M2 ResNet18/34/VGG11/16 fixtures+tests → M3 ASPP probe-then-migrate → M4 DenseNet121 BN → M5 Bottleneck/BasicBlock dilation+FCN. Each movement: implement → run targeted test → record outcome. Single fixture-regen at end. Cross-cutting: ResNet50/ViT must remain PASS.
